isolation.surface: code inspection and build/test output analysis

VAL-FILL-01.evidence: Content enum in libraries/scene/lib.rs (line 240) has exactly 4 variants: None, Image, Path, Glyphs. No FillRect variant exists. Grep for 'FillRect' across all .rs files under system/ found matches only in test/tests/scene.rs as comments (lines 2526, 2527, 2885, 3016, 4284) and in DESIGN.md (non-code). Zero production code references. cargo build --release exits 0.
VAL-FILL-01.details: Content enum variants confirmed at lines 240-282 of libraries/scene/lib.rs: None (line 244), Image (line 246), Path (line 256), Glyphs (line 269). FillRect references in .rs files exist only as comments in test code explaining the removal.

VAL-CROSS-01.evidence: Compile-time assertion at line 656 of libraries/scene/lib.rs: `const _: () = assert!(core::mem::size_of::<Node>() == 96);`. cargo build --release succeeds (exit 0), confirming the assertion passes. Both writer (core) and reader (compositor) link the same scene crate, so the size is structurally consistent.
VAL-CROSS-01.details: Single size assertion at line 656 using value 96. Additional size_of::<Node>() usages at lines 663 (DATA_OFFSET calculation) and 699 (NODE_SIZE constant) are consistent. Build success confirms compile-time check passes.

VAL-CROSS-02.evidence: Content match at line 776 of libraries/render/scene_render.rs has 4 explicit arms: Content::None (line 777), Content::Path (line 778), Content::Glyphs (line 785), Content::Image (line 826). No wildcard `_ =>` arm present. cargo build --release succeeds, confirming exhaustive match.
VAL-CROSS-02.details: The match block at line 776 dispatches: None => no-op, Path => render_path(), Glyphs => glyph cache lookup + coverage drawing, Image => bilinear resampling blit. No catch-all wildcard. Rust's exhaustiveness checking guarantees all variants are covered.

VAL-CROSS-06.evidence: cd /Users/user/Sites/os/system && cargo build --release exits 0. Output: 'Finished `release` profile [optimized] target(s) in 0.00s'. Target is aarch64-unknown-none (bare-metal).
VAL-CROSS-06.details: Build was already cached (0.00s) confirming clean state. Exit code 0 confirms successful compilation for bare-metal target.

VAL-CROSS-07.evidence: cd /Users/user/Sites/os/system/test && cargo test -- --test-threads=1 exits 0. 58 test binaries run. Total: 1801 passed, 0 failed across all binaries. Exceeds baseline of 1791.
VAL-CROSS-07.details: All 58 test result lines show 'ok' status with 0 failures. Sum of passed counts: 1801. Notable binaries: scene tests (290 passed), drawing tests (164 passed), kernel tests (133 passed), render tests (81 passed), font tests (76 passed).

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Content enum has exactly 4 variants (None, Image, Path, Glyphs) with no FillRect. Node size assertion (96 bytes) passes at compile time. Render backend exhaustively matches all 4 Content variants with no wildcard. Build succeeds for aarch64-unknown-none. Full test suite: 1801 passed, 0 failed (exceeds 1791 baseline).
